methodology.bound_verification: For each check: true_cosine > upper_bound + 1e-9 → violation count++

madhava_sec_bound_validation.note: The 254M figure commonly cited refers to Madhava Cascade (vector search on BIGANN-100M, 100M vectors × 2 stages + modulation). Madhava-Sec core has ~3.55M verified pairs. Both have 0 violations.
